name: alloydb
description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB for PostgreSQL database and data.

alloydb_postgres_project.title: Project ID
alloydb_postgres_project.description: ID of the Google Cloud project

alloydb_postgres_user.title: User
alloydb_postgres_user.description: (Optional) Username of the database user (Default: IAM user)

alloydb_postgres_password.title: Password
alloydb_postgres_password.description: (Optional) Password of the database user (Default: IAM user)

alloydb_postgres_ip_type.title: IP Type
alloydb_postgres_ip_type.description: (Optional) Type of the IP address: PUBLIC, PRIVATE, or PSC (Default: Public)
